description: An agent needs to walk a new customer through setting up their modem and activating their service.

nodes.task_description: Verify the customer's account and confirm their self-install kit has been delivered.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies the new customer account.

nodes.task_description: Provide clear, step-by-step instructions for connecting the modem and router.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly explains the setup process.

nodes.task_description: Once the modem is online, trigger the service activation from the system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully sends the activation signal to the modem.
